# Playbooks — routing index

Generated from `docs/playbooks/` and `CODEOWNERS`. The hand-written summary lives at [`../playbooks/README.md`](../playbooks/README.md); this page is the machine-readable view used by `lint-instructions` and by the squad bootstrapper to map labels to playbooks.

| # | Playbook | Triggers (excerpt) | CI checks | Sensitive |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | :---: |

## Sensitive playbooks

A ✓ above means the playbook governs a path that appears in `CODEOWNERS` with a non-default reviewer. Edits to those playbooks themselves require the same reviewer.
